div.p: Invariant: Total Order on Sequence Linearization Points (LPs) defined by hardware CAS serialization:

ul.li: t₂: Thread B links node [2] to [1]
t₃: Thread C links node [3] to [2]
t₄: Thread A links node [4] to [3]

div.p: Result: FIFO Preservation Confirmed Hardware atomicity on tail->next ensures a single monotonic path. Dequeue follows this path exactly, preserving original LP order.
Linearization Analysis The CAS on tail->next is the definitive event.

ol.li: No two CAS operations succeed for the same pointer.
The resulting linked list structure is the physical manifestation of the logical timeline.
